An AI-generated animation by China’s state broadcaster satirising the US-Israel war on Iran has gone viral, triggering a wave of user-made sequels online.
First posted by CCTV on Wednesday, the wuxia-style allegory centres on a war between the “White Eagle” and the “Persian Cat” – clearly representi

news.headline: In phone call with Pezeshkian, PM stresses ‘urgent need’ for collective efforts for de-escalation in Mideast
news.summary:
<p>Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif held a telephone call with Iran President Masoud Pezeshkian on Monday, during which he stressed the “urgent need” for collective efforts for de-escalation in the Middle East and a return to dialogue and diplomacy.</p>

news.headline: ICC names Sahibzada Farhan player of the month for Feb after ‘stellar’ performance with bat at T20 World Cup
news.summary:
<p>The International Cricket Council (ICC) on Monday declared Pakistan opener Sahibzada Farhan as ICC Men’s Player of the Month for February after his “stellar display with the bat” at the recent <a href="https://www.dawn.com/live/t20-worldcup-2026">T20 World Cup</a>.</p>

news.headline: Greece trial begins for rail disaster that killed 57
news.summary:
A criminal trial opened in Greece on Monday over a train collision that killed 57 people, many of them college students, in a disaster that horrified the country and revealed long-neglected safety failures.
